title: Terminology and Scope (Axial Physiology Lab Working Note APL-001)
description: Foundation-layer working note of the Axial Physiology Lab. Sets out the mechanobiological basis for how the axial, load-bearing tissues respond to physical and mechanical stimuli — the shared principle of mechanotransduction and its expression in the skeletal, neuromuscular, fascial, and lymphatic systems — and the mechanism-versus-efficacy (evidence-distance) boundary the lab keeps explicit throughout. Self-published, versioned, not peer-reviewed.
notes: Author discloses commercial interest: founder of Longevity Space (develops low-intensity vibration devices, incl. AEVUM). Self-funded; no external research funding.
